name: hedgehog-mode-anywhere
description: Add an adorable animated hedgehog buddy to any website, powered by PostHog's hedgehog-mode engine.
comment: Depends on the workspace @posthog/hedgehog-mode, which must keep pixi.js externalized (PostHog/hedgehog-mode#30): the inlined-pixi builds can't be patched for the eval/worker CSP limits of MV3 content scripts. pixi.js is a direct dep because content.jsx imports pixi.js/unsafe-eval and loadTextures.
